true_header: Aspiegel nda template
Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
Between:
Aspiegel  limited ,
Insert the other party’s name or company name ,
Whereas
Each  party  wishes  to  disclose  to  the  other  party  confidential  information  in  relation  to  the purpose.
In consideration of the benefits to the parties of the disclosure of the confidential information,
Now it is hereby agreed as follows: -
Definitions and interpretation
The fact that discussions and negotiations are taking place concerning the purpose and the status of those discussions and negotiations;
The existence and terms of this agreement;
Any information relating to:
The  business,  affairs,  customers,  clients,  suppliers,
The  operations,  processes,  product  information,  know-how,
Any information or analysis derived from confidential information.
Confidentiality undertaking
To keep secret and confidential all confidential information of the disclosing party;

To use or apply the confidential information of the  disclosing  party solely for the purpose and  so  as  to  determine  whether  or  not  and  on  what  terms  the  parties  might  wish  to proceed;
Not to use, copy, adapt, alter,
Not  at  any  time,
To  provide  proper  and  secure  storage  for  each  and  every  part  of  the  confidential information received by it in tangible form whilst it is in its custody,

To return  or  destroy  or  if  stored  in  electronic  form  to erase  from  its systems  (to the  extent possible)  at  its  own  expense  the  confidential  information  of  the  disclosing  party  together with any copies in its possession or in the possession of its representatives at the request of the disclosing party.
Disclosure to third parties
Limitation

Is  or  becomes  generally  available  to  the  public  other  than  as  a  result  of  its  disclosure  by the  recipient  party  or  its  representatives  in  breach  of  this  agreement  or  of  any  other undertaking of confidentiality addressed to the party to whom the information relates;
Is  in  its  possession  or  known  to  it  by  being  in  its  use  or  being  recorded  in  its  files  or computers  or  other  recording  media,
Was obtained legally from any third party,
Is  developed  by  the  recipient  party  independently  of  the  information  disclosed  by  the disclosing party.
The recipient party may disclose confidential information to the extent required:
By any  order  of any court  of competent jurisdiction or any competent judicial,
By  the  rules  of  any  listing  authority,
By applicable laws or regulations,
No rights in and no warranty on confidential information
Term and termination
If  either  party  decides  not  to become,
Remedies
Entire agreement and variation
No waiver
Assignment
Notices
No partnership
Third party rights
Governing law

Samed 20confidentiality 20non 20disclosure 20and 20conflict 20of 20interest 20agreement 20for 20board 20and 20committee 20members 20ver 201
Confidentiality, non-disclosure and conflict of interest agreement ver 1 adopted by the samed board on: november 2013
Confidentiality policy
Definitions
“agreement” means this confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
"board" means the board of samed.
“board members” means members of the board.
“chair” means chair of the board.
"committee" means a committee of the board.
"committee members" means members of any committee.
"meeting" means a meeting of the board or a committee, as applicable.
"policy" means this confidentiality policy
“samed” means south african medical devices industry association
“vice-chair”, means vice-chair of the board
The information
Confidentiality
Regular  board  meetings  are,
Members of samed may on invitation attend board meetings.
Once the board has dealt with an issue in a board meeting and has decided on that matter,
All decisions that would be accessible to the general membership and/or the public at large will be recorded as such in the board minutes.
If no recordal is made, the matter,
When considering  whether matters are confidential or not,
The board also holds in-camera meetings,
Committees  are  advisory  to  the  board.
Conflict of interest
Any member of the samed board, executive,
Contract is defined as any written or verbal agreement between two or more parties for the doing or not doing of something specified which is related to the matter at hand.
Transaction is defined as an exchange of money, services, goods, position,
Interest  is  defined  as  any  instance  where  any  contract  or  transaction,
In the event of a conflict of interest, the interested party shall:
Prior to any vote on the issue,
Refrain from voting in relation to the matter.
Withdraw from the meeting when the matter is discussed if requested to do so by a simple majority of the members present and voting at the meeting.
Breaches
In the case of a breach by a board or committee member,
Terms
Additional action
Amendments
No amendment,
Entire agreement
Governing law
Severability

In the event of any one or more of the provisions of this agreement being held for any reason to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable in any respect, such invalidity, illegality or unenforceability  shall  not  affect  any  other  provision  of  this  agreement,  and  this agreement shall be construed as if such invalid, illegal or unenforceable provision was not  a  part  of  this  agreement,  and  the  agreement  shall  be  carried  out  as  nearly  as possible in accordance with its original terms and intent.

Nda 9
Non disclosure agreement (page 1 of 3)
Confidentiality
Written information received from the other party which is marked or identified as "confidential";

Oral or visual information identified as confidential at the time of disclosure which is reduced to written form and provided to the other in such written form promptly after such oral or visual disclosure,
Already known by the recipient party prior to the disclosure thereof with no obligation of confidentiality;
Publicly known or becomes publicly known not due to any unauthorised act of the recipient party;
Rightfully received from a third party; or
Independently developed by the recipient party without use of the other party's information; or
Disclosed without similar restrictions by the party owning the information to any third party; or
Approved by the other party for disclosure; or
Required to be disclosed pursuant to a governmental or legal requirement provided that the disclosing party gives to the other party written notice of such requirement prior to any such disclosure.
Publicly known or becomes publicly known not due to any unauthorised act of the recipient party;
Rightfully received from a third party; or
Independently developed by the recipient party without use of the other party's information; or

Approved by the other party for disclosure; or
Required to be disclosed pursuant to a governmental or legal requirement provided that the disclosing party gives to the other party written notice of such requirement prior to any such disclosure.
Return of information
No warranty/liability
No further rights
Business purpose
Injunctive rights
Media releases
General
Notices
Entire agreement
This agreement and any attachments hereto:
Supersede   all   related   discussions   and   other   communications between the parties;
May only be modified in writing by authorised representatives of the parties.
